title: lissochilus stolzianus
intro: Lissochilus stolzianus, also known as the Stolz's orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, cough, and bronchitis, and are believed to have health benefits such as antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Lissochilus stolzianus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
